title: On Equality — Question Answers
subject: Social Science
notes: Equality means that all people should be treated with dignity and respect.
The Indian Constitution recognizes every person as equal before law.
Universal adult franchise means every adult citizen has the right to vote.
Democracy requires equality and participation of all citizens.
summary: This chapter explains the meaning of equality in a democracy. It discusses equal rights, dignity, universal adult franchise and examples of inequality in society. It also explains how the Constitution protects equality.

qa.a: Equality means that every person should be treated equally and with dignity, regardless of caste, religion, gender or economic status.
Universal adult franchise means that every adult citizen has the right to vote.
